1.description: Update field values on an existing service request. Takes the request_id and a fields object of the changes to apply (shallow-merged into the stored form). Action-tier: confirm the change with the user before calling. For a service request whose catalog_id is unknown, fetch its schema with get_service_request_fields first so the field keys are valid.

parameters.name: request_id
parameters.description: The service request id to update.

parameters.name: fields
parameters.description: The field changes to apply, keyed by field_name.
